one_time_description: Fisheries agreement trust funds received, held as restricted cash
economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Pecheries Baie Chaleurs Fisheries (2012) Inc., Esgenoopetitj Power Centre Inc., and Esgenoopetitj Development Corporation Ltd. The Development Corporation operates mini-casino operations.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to unauditable mini-casino revenues from Esgenoopetitj Development Corporation Ltd. — same qualification as prior year. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Large fisheries agreement trust funds ($9.5M) received and held as restricted cash represent a significant one-time inflow affecting cash position. Net loss from government business enterprises of $500,783 included in other income/loss. No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages.
